# growthbook_archetype (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook archetype by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique archetype identifier.

### Read-Only

- `attributes` (String) JSON-encoded object of attribute values.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) Archetype description.
- `environments` (List of String) Environments this archetype is limited to.
- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the archetype is shared with the team.
- `name` (String) Archetype name.
- `owner` (String) User ID of the archetype owner.
- `owner_email` (String) Resolved email of the archetype owner.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this archetype is scoped to.
